testcase.name: detectRiskyContent - Inverted Allow-List Model > Safe Zone - agent_workspace paths (NO WARNING) > should NOT warn for full path to agent_workspace file

detectRiskyContent - Inverted Allow-List Model > Error Handling - Fail Open > should handle edge cases without throwing
detectRiskyContent - Inverted Allow-List Model > Error Handling - Fail Open > should not throw on circular references

detectRiskyContent - Inverted Allow-List Model > Return Value Structure > should have consistent type definitions
detectRiskyContent - Inverted Allow-List Model > Real-World Scenarios > should detect file operation in blocked directory
detectRiskyContent - Inverted Allow-List Model > Real-World Scenarios > should allow file operation in safe zone
detectRiskyContent - Inverted Allow-List Model > Real-World Scenarios > should detect modification of protected file
detectRiskyContent - Inverted Allow-List Model > Real-World Scenarios > should detect system command in tutorial
detectRiskyContent - Inverted Allow-List Model > Real-World Scenarios > should NOT detect normal development workflow
detectRiskyContent - Inverted Allow-List Model > Real-World Scenarios > should NOT detect bug report
detectRiskyContent - Inverted Allow-List Model > Real-World Scenarios > should handle complex multi-pattern content
detectRiskyContent - Inverted Allow-List Model > Real-World Scenarios > should detect cleanup script with blocked directory
detectRiskyContent - Inverted Allow-List Model > Real-World Scenarios > should detect database migration with destructive keyword
